name: The Hive (Learning Hub)
description: Iconic 12-storey beehive structure housing collaborative learning spaces, tutorial rooms, and studios.

name: North Spine Plaza
description: Main north campus spine connecting academic buildings with canteens and admin offices.

name: South Spine
description: South campus connector with canteens, Co-op, and student services.

name: Lee Wee Nam Library
description: Main NTU library with 24/7 study areas, digital resources, and maker spaces.

name: School of Art, Design & Media
description: Curved green-roofed building housing art, design, and media programmes.

name: School of Biological Sciences
description: Biological sciences research and teaching facility.

name: School of Physical & Mathematical Sciences
description: Houses the departments of Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry.

name: Sports Hall
description: Indoor sports complex with badminton, basketball, squash, and gym facilities.

name: Shuttle Bus Stop – North
description: North campus shuttle bus terminus. Routes A, B, C depart here.

name: Shuttle Bus Stop – South
description: South campus shuttle bus stop. Route D loop.

name: Hall of Residence 1
description: Residential hall on the west side of campus.

name: School of Civil & Environmental Engineering
description: Civil, environmental, and geomatics engineering department.
